ddls:
CREATE TABLE "squirrels" (
  "squirrel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each squirrel */,
  "unique_squirrel_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each squirrel observation */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age of the squirrel (e.g., Juvenile, Adult) */,
  "primary_fur_color" TEXT /* Primary fur color of the squirrel */,
  "highlight_fur_color" TEXT /* Highlight fur color of the squirrel */,
  "combination_of_primary_and_highlight_color" TEXT /* Combination of primary and highlight fur colors */,
  "color_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on squirrel color */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the squirrel (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the squirrel */,
  "body_condition" TEXT /* Overall body condition (e.g., Healthy, Malnourished) */,
  "last_sighting_date" TEXT /* Date of the last sighting of the squirrel */,
  "sighting_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of sightings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("squirrel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "latlong" TEXT /* Geospatial coordinates of the location */,
  "zip_codes" INTEGER /* Zip code of the location */,
  "community_districts" INTEGER /* Community district of the location */,
  "borough_boundaries" INTEGER /* Borough boundary of the location */,
  "city_council_districts" INTEGER /* City council district of the location */,
  "police_precincts" INTEGER /* Police precinct of the location */,
  "elevation" TEXT /* Elevation of the location */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat (e.g., Forest, Grassland) */,
  "land_use" TEXT /* Land use (e.g., Park, Residential) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the location data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "squirrel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the squirrel being observed */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the observation was made */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "shift" TEXT /* Shift of the observation (e.g., AM, PM) */,
  "hectare" TEXT /* Hectare where the observation was made */,
  "hectare_squirrel_number" INTEGER /* Squirrel number in the hectare */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observer (linked to the `users` table) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the observation (e.g., Sunny, Rainy) */,
  "temperature" TEXT /* Temperature during the observation */,
  "humidity" TEXT /* Humidity during the observation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_squirrel_id FOREIGN KEY ("squirrel_id") REFERENCES squirrels ("squirrel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_observer_id FOREIGN KEY ("observer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "behaviors" (
  "behavior_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each behavior observation */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation where the behavior was recorded */,
  "running" INTEGER /* Running behavior (1 = yes, 0 = no) */,
  "chasing" INTEGER /* Chasing behavior (1 = yes, 0 = no) */,
  "climbing" INTEGER /* Climbing behavior (1 = yes, 0 = no) */,
  "eating" INTEGER /* Eating behavior (1 = yes, 0 = no) */,
  "foraging" INTEGER /* Foraging behavior (1 = yes, 0 = no) */,
  "other_activities" TEXT /* Other activities (e.g., sitting, playing) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the behavior in seconds */,
  "intensity" TEXT /* Intensity of the behavior (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("behavior_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_behaviors_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_indicators" (
  "health_indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health indicator */,
  "squirrel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the squirrel being observed */,
  "tail_flags" INTEGER /* Tail flags (1 = yes, 0 = no) */,
  "tail_twitches" INTEGER /* Tail twitches (1 = yes, 0 = no) */,
  "latlong" TEXT /* Geospatial coordinates of the observation */,
  "fur_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the fur (e.g., Shiny, Dull) */,
  "tail_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the tail (e.g., Intact, Damaged) */,
  "eye_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the eyes (e.g., Clear, Cloudy) */,
  "ear_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the ears (e.g., Clean, Dirty) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_squirrel_id FOREIGN KEY ("squirrel_id") REFERENCES squirrels ("squirrel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "squirrel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the squirrel being observed */,
  "approaches" INTEGER /* Approaches (1 = yes, 0 = no) */,
  "indifferent" INTEGER /* Indifferent (1 = yes, 0 = no) */,
  "runs_from" INTEGER /* Runs from (1 = yes, 0 = no) */,
  "other_interactions" TEXT /* Other interactions (e.g., feeding, chasing) */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., Feeding, Chasing) */,
  "interaction_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in seconds */,
  "interaction_intensity" TEXT /* Intensity of the interaction (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_squirrel_id FOREIGN KEY ("squirrel_id") REFERENCES squirrels ("squirrel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kuks" (
  "kuk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each kuk */,
  "squirrel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the squirrel being observed */,
  "kuks" INTEGER /* Number of kuks */,
  "sound_intensity" TEXT /* Intensity of the sound (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "sound_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the sound in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kuk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kuks_squirrel_id FOREIGN KEY ("squirrel_id") REFERENCES squirrels ("squirrel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quaas" (
  "quaa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quaa */,
  "squirrel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the squirrel being observed */,
  "quaas" INTEGER /* Number of quaas */,
  "sound_intensity" TEXT /* Intensity of the sound (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "sound_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the sound in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quaa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quaas_squirrel_id FOREIGN KEY ("squirrel_id") REFERENCES squirrels ("squirrel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moans" (
  "moan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moan */,
  "squirrel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the squirrel being observed */,
  "moans" INTEGER /* Number of moans */,
  "sound_intensity" TEXT /* Intensity of the sound (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "sound_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the sound in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moans_squirrel_id FOREIGN KEY ("squirrel_id") REFERENCES squirrels ("squirrel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "latlongs" (
  "latlong_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geospatial coordinate */,
  "latlong" TEXT /* Geospatial coordinate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("latlong_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zip_codes" (
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zip code */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* Zip code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_districts" (
  "community_district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community district */,
  "community_district" INTEGER /* Community district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "borough_boundaries" (
  "borough_boundary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough boundary */,
  "borough_boundary" INTEGER /* Borough boundary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_boundary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_council_districts" (
  "city_council_district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city council district */,
  "city_council_district" INTEGER /* City council district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_council_district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "police_precincts" (
  "police_precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each police precinct */,
  "police_precinct" INTEGER /* Police precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("police_precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* User name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role (e.g., researcher, park ranger, volunteer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
